name: LRPMP Governmental-Use Properties (2013)
description: The 11 former RDA parcels transferred to the City of RPV via the Long-Range Property Management Plan. Approved by Oversight Board (OB-2013-08, Sept 18, 2013) and DOF (April 25, 2014). Conveyed by grant deed November 4, 2014.

properties.name: 10 Cherryhill Lane
properties.ccr_note: CC&Rs recorded against parcel could limit development or use (LRPMP, Title Information)
encumbrances: Landslide Moratorium Ordinance — no new residences
Title disputes expected (private improvements slid onto parcels)
